CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Michela Alioto-Pier'S Motion To Grant Declaratory Relief And Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES R. SUTTON & ATTY. WILLIAM B. TUNICK OF THE SUTTON LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 732-4503 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. JON GIVNER & ATTY. MOLLIE LEE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4694 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO;
ATTY. THOMAS PAUL PIER OF THE ALIOTO ALW FIRM, TEL. NO. 434-8900 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. Plaintiff Michela Alioto-Pier'S Motion To Grant Declaratory Relief And Writ Of Mandate IS GRANTED AND THE RESPONDENT BE PERMITTED ANOTHER TERM. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Ntc And Motion To Grant Declaratory Relief And Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHELA ALIOTO-PIER'S MOTION TO GRANT DECLARATORY RELIEF AND WRIT OF MANDATE is transferred to Dept. 301, to be heard July 21, 2010. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
